# oDesigns

> AI-powered social media post generator and design tool. Create stunning social media posts, ads, and app store previews in seconds — schedule and publish across Instagram, Facebook, Threads, and Twitter/X from one dashboard.

## What is oDesigns?

oDesigns is a SaaS platform that helps businesses, marketers, and creators generate professional social media content using AI. Users describe their brand or paste a website URL, and AI generates ready-to-publish post designs with captions. No design skills required.

## Key Capabilities

- Generate professional social media posts with AI in seconds
- Create app store screenshots and preview images
- Design ads and promotional content for any platform
- Schedule and publish to Instagram, Facebook, Threads, and Twitter/X
- Maintain brand consistency with custom colors, fonts, and logos
- Adapt designs to any aspect ratio (1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9)
- Bulk schedule posts with a visual calendar
- Export as PNG or bulk ZIP download
- Full multi-language support: English, Arabic, Spanish, Portuguese, French, Turkish, Indonesian

## Who Uses oDesigns?

- Small businesses building social media presence without hiring designers
- Marketing agencies managing multiple client brands
- E-commerce stores promoting products and sales
- Restaurants and food businesses showcasing menus
- Real estate agents creating property listings
- App developers generating app store screenshots and promotional materials
- Content creators maintaining consistent posting schedules
- Freelancers offering social media management services

## Pricing

- Free plan available with core features
- Pro and Business plans with higher limits and advanced capabilities
- Details: https://odesigns.app/pricing
